hero.subtitle: Create elegant digital invitations, manage real-time RSVPs and give your guests an unforgettable experience.

invite.message: "Your presence will make this day even more special. Confirm by September 30."

access.title: Administrators and Organizers
access.description: Nkhuvu platform is managed by authorized administrators. If you are an event organizer and need access, request your account.
access.note: Only authorized administrators have access to the dashboard. Request your account via the email above.

features.title: Everything you need for your event
features.subtitle: A complete platform that takes care of every detail, from invitation to final confirmation.

digitalInvites.title: Digital Invitations
digitalInvites.desc: Fully customizable design with colors, fonts and your event style. Unique link for each guest.

guestManagement.title: Guest Management
guestManagement.desc: Add, edit and organize all guests. Track who confirmed or declined.

rsvpRealTime.title: Real-time RSVP
rsvpRealTime.desc: Track confirmations instantly, manage companions and dietary preferences.

giftList.title: Gift List
giftList.desc: Create physical gift lists and monetary contributions with IBAN, M-Pesa and bank references.

eventProgram.title: Event Program
eventProgram.desc: Add schedules and activities for ceremony, cocktail, dinner and party.

tableManagement.title: Table Management
tableManagement.desc: Create tables, set capacity and organize guests by seating.

multiChannel.title: Multi-channel Sending
multiChannel.desc: Send invitations via SMS, WhatsApp or email. Schedule automatic reminders.

visualCustom.title: Visual Customization
visualCustom.desc: Primary and accent colors. Dark, light or image background. Customizable fonts.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.desc: Complete dashboard with real-time statistics: total guests, confirmations and headcount.

mapLocation.title: Map and Location
mapLocation.desc: Add Google Maps URL to help your guests arrive easily.

prioritySupport.title: Priority Support
prioritySupport.desc: Email and phone support available for all guest questions.

securityControl.title: Security & Control
securityControl.desc: Unique tokens per guest. Multiple administrators per event with access levels.

founderStory.title: Born from a family story
founderStory.p1: Anderson Macuche created Nkhuvu after seeing his family face difficulties organizing his grandparents' 50th anniversary.
founderStory.p2: The task of sending invitations, tracking confirmations and organizing guests became a huge challenge. That's where the idea came from: a digital platform that would make every celebration simpler, more organized and memorable.
founderStory.p3: Nkhuvu means "celebration" in Changana, the language that cradles traditions and unites families. It's more than a platform: it's a tool to honor moments that last forever.
founderStory.quote: Celebrating is being together. Facilitating is our purpose.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In three simple steps, your event comes to life digitally

chooseTemplate.title: Choose a template
chooseTemplate.desc: Select from elegant designs and adapt to your style

personalize.title: Personalize details
personalize.desc: Add event information, venue, date and gift list

shareTrack.title: Share & track
shareTrack.desc: Send the link and see confirmations in real-time

testimonial.quote: Nkhuvu completely transformed our wedding management. The invitations are beautiful and the confirmation system saved hours of work. I recommend it to all families.
